Product Pricing Security Docs Get started
Get started Source on GitHub
free to self-host · AGPL-3.0

Docs

Everything needed to run Briefkist yourself, or to get the most out of a hosted server. Written for careful people, not sysadmins.

Self-host on Linux Docker Compose on any box you own — from a NUC in the meter cupboard to an old desktop. ~20 minutes · docker compose up Self-host on a Mac Native on a Mac mini — the setup the author runs at home, fast local AI included. ~15 minutes · what we run ourselves Hosted quickstart From signup to first filed letter: passphrase, pairing your phone, and the first scan. ~10 minutes · no terminal needed
all guides
Configurationcoming soon Backupscoming soon Updatescoming soon Pairing devicescoming soon FAQcoming soon Troubleshootingcoming soon

every page has an "edit on GitHub" link — corrections welcome

briefkist

Your mail stays home. A private, searchable archive for the letters in your life — on hardware you control.

no third party in the data path
